questions.q: In a mid-April 2026 memo, Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro announced that the company is currently laying off approximately how many employees to 'streamline' operations?
In April 2026, Google announced that starting in June, it will begin penalizing websites in search rankings for employing which deceptive user-experience tactic?
In April 2026, the Justice Department moved to toss seditious conspiracy convictions for members of the Proud Boys and what other group?
U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent accused China of being an 'unreliable partner' by hoarding what commodity during the Middle East war?
Fueled by renewed momentum in the AI trade, Nvidia's stock recently recorded its longest winning streak since 2023. How many consecutive days did it rise as of April 14, 2026?
According to prosecutors in April 2026, a man charged with an arson attack on OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's house was found carrying what item?
options: A USB drive of stolen code

questions.q: An Oklahoma high school principal was hailed as a hero for tackling a gunman after being shot in which body part?
An April 2026 study analyzing five popular AI chatbots for medical accuracy found that which chatbot generated the fewest highly problematic responses?

A 2026 study examining concentrated animal feeding operations found that overall cancer incidence rates were 4% to 8% higher near industrial factory farms in California, Texas, and which other US state?
U.S. President Donald Trump recently stated he asked which global leader in a letter not to provide weapons to Iran?
